subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse for Q4 2024 active seats and cost by product. Calculate average cost per active seat and sort descending.

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL query task with moderate complexity. Requires aggregation (COUNT of active seats, SUM of cost) grouped by product with a calculated metric (cost/seat), filtering for Q4 2024, and ordering. This is a straightforward multi-table join with window aggregation logic that mid-tier (Sonnet 4.6) can reliably handle. No cross-source reconciliation needed; single-source SQL warehouse query. Cost justified: one subtask avoids unnecessary decomposition.

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_cost, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, CASE WHEN SUM(daily_active_seats) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(amount_usd) / SUM(daily_active_seats), 2) ELSE NULL END AS avg_cost_per_active_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND fiscal_quarter = 4 AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_active_seat DESC NULLS LAST
